strengths: Shows familiarity with FLS equipment and setup procedures
Demonstrates understanding of proper materials preparation
weaknesses: Did not perform the actual peg transfer task
Failed to demonstrate any transfer movements or techniques
No evidence of pegboard manipulation or ring handling

drills.name: Basic transfer sequence rehearsal
drills.description: Complete 10 full six-ring transfers focusing on consistent pickup and release patterns without time pressure.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not perform the actual peg transfer task

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Practice 12 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, emphasizing stable release and regrasp angle.
drills.targets_weakness: No evidence of pegboard manipulation or ring handling

progression_note: At the intermediate level, you need to move beyond setup and actually execute the transfer task. Focus on completing full task attempts to build on your existing equipment familiarity.
